message.content:
@startuml
title RqP - Request Resource

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 25
skinparam BoxPadding 15
skinparam NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
skinparam NoteBorderColor #999999

actor "Requesting Party\n(RqP)" as RqP

box "Client Application (CA)\n<<Custom Application>>" #98FB98
participant "User Interface" as UI
end box

box "Resource Server (RS)\n<<Custom Application>>" #FAD7B5
participant "REST API" as RS_REST
database "Resource" as RS_Resource
database "Credential" as RS_Credential
end box

box "Authorization Server (AS)\nForgeRock Access Manager" #F7E7D3
participant "AM API" as AM_API
participant "UMA API" as UMA_API
participant "OAuth API" as OAUTH_API
end box

box "Content Server (CS)\n<<Custom Application>>" #AEEEEE
participant "REST API" as CS_REST
database "Data" as CS_Data
end box

RqP -> UI : Authenticate
UI --> RqP : Authenticated
RqP -> UI : Access Interface

activate UI
UI -> UI : Obtain Resource Id\n(maybe from Discover Resources)
UI -> RS_REST : GET /share/resources/{resourceId}\nscopes (no valid RPT)
deactivate UI

activate RS_REST
RS_REST -> RS_Resource : Get _id
activate RS_Resource
RS_Resource --> RS_REST : meta data
deactivate RS_Resource

RS_REST -> RS_Credential : Get PAT
activate RS_Credential
RS_Credential --> RS_REST : PAT
deactivate RS_Credential

note left of RS_REST
Get permission ticket for the
resource and scope
end note

RS_REST -> UMA_API : POST /am/uma/permission_request\nresource_id + scopes
activate UMA_API
UMA_API --> RS_REST : permission ticket
deactivate UMA_API

RS_REST --> UI : permission ticket + AS URI
deactivate RS_REST

activate UI
UI -> UI : Get client auth basic

note left of UI
Get claim token for the
Requesting Party (RqP)
end note

UI -> OAUTH_API : POST /am/oauth2/access_token\nscope=openid\nSSO session
activate OAUTH_API
OAUTH_API -> OAUTH_API : Validate SSO session
OAUTH_API --> UI : claim token
deactivate OAUTH_API

note left of UI
Get Requesting Party Token (RPT)
using the permission ticket
and claim token
end note

UI -> OAUTH_API : POST /am/oauth2/access_token\ngrant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:uma-ticket\nscope=..., ticket=..., claim_token=..., claim_token_format=...
activate OAUTH_API

activate AM_API
AM_API -> AM_API : Check Access
AM_API -> AM_API : No Policy for RqP + Resource + scopes\nCreate Access Request for Resource Owner
AM_API -> AM_API : No Access, request Submitted
deactivate AM_API

OAUTH_API --> UI : Error: Request Submitted
deactivate OAUTH_API
deactivate UI

UI --> RqP : Error: Request Submitted

@enduml
